    Account Document

    Document Workflow

    Not Started
    Manage the blank document, email it to another recipient, and submit a completed copy for Red Threads review.
    Submitting a document does not approve it automatically. Red Threads will review the account-level document before updating your organization status.
    Source Document
    View the source PDF, download a blank copy, or email it to another department.
    View Source Document Download Blank PDF
    Current Submission
    View Submitted Document
    Complete in Portal
    Fill out the core Michigan exemption details here for Red Threads review. You can still upload a completed certificate instead.
    Upload Completed Document
    Upload a signed PDF or image if you completed the document outside the portal.

    Account Document Review

    Red Threads Credit Terms • Team Review

    Not Started
    Review the signed credit terms document, assign payment terms, and approve or request changes.

    Please wait while we prepare the signed credit terms file for review.
    Preview unavailable
    Use the review rail to open the submitted file directly in Drive.
    Enter email(s)
    Comma separate multiple emails.
    Attach completed document

    No file selected.
    Once your document is submitted, RedThreads will review and notify you upon approval or if changes need to be made.

    Open Submitted File Download Copy
    Assign Payment Terms
    Choose the approved payment terms that should be stored at the organization level.

    Document Submitted
    Your credit terms document has been submitted for Red Threads review. This view will close automatically in a few seconds.
    Team Controls
    Manage account workflows, locked orders, client return links, and production completion updates.
    Send to email(s)
    Comma separate multiple recipients.
    Select job completion dates
    Use the required YYYY-MM-DD format for each job you are marking complete.

    Michigan Sales and Use Tax Certificate of Exemption • Official Form 3372

    Loading submitted document…
    Please wait while we prepare the completed tax exemption form for review.
    Enter email(s)
    Comma separate multiple emails.
    Attach completed document
    Click below to choose the finished tax exemption file you want to send for RedThreads review.

    Once your document is submitted, RedThreads will review and notify you upon approval or if changes need to be made.
    Add Signature
    Draw a signature here, then place it onto the certificate.

    Success
    Your document has been submitted for review.
    Why is this being denied?
    This message will be emailed to the client so they know what to correct before resubmitting.
    Warning; unsaved changes.
    You have unsaved changes. If you leave, they will be lost.

    Approve Final Artwork

    Disclaimer: Digital colors are not 100% accurate to real life and will appear different in person. Inks and threads interact differently with various garments, garment colors, and lighting. The scale of the design(s) will appear differently on different shirt sizes. By approving this artwork and placing your order, you acknowledge these facts and agree that varied results are not errors, but a normal part of the process. Red Threads is not liable for perceived errors of this nature.
    Mockup unavailable
    Mockup unavailable
    Mockup unavailable
    Please review mockups carefully. Click to expand images. What you see is exactly what will be printed. If there are errors of any kind, including spelling errors, and you approve final artwork, Red Threads will proceed with production. Red Threads will not be held responsible for any "mistakes" or additional costs if we print the job exactly as you approved. If Red Threads makes any mistakes beyond what was approved, that's on us and we'll certainly make it right, every time.
    ✓

    Success, your artwork is approved.

    Finish entering your sizes and quantities and Place Your Order when ready.

    Purchase Order Invoice

    ✓

    Success! Your invoice is being emailed.

    Once your company approves the invoice, return to this project's invoice tab and upload your Purchase Order details. Production will begin upon Purchase Order submission.

    Place Order

    Checkout

    1. Select a delivery method.

    2. Select a payment method.

    Select delivery method to proceed.
    Select payment method to proceed.
    This feature is not unlocked.

    We will generate an invoice and lock this portal while payment is pending.

    Purchase orders require approved terms.

    View Terms Download Terms

    Order cannot be placed until all artwork is approved

    Creating your checkout session...

    Continue to open Stripe Checkout in this window. Return with the browser Back button if needed.

    Continue secure payment
    ✓

    Order status updated.

    We saved the latest order state.

    ACH Bank Payment

    Choose how this order should move forward. Stripe remains the secure bank confirmation, authorization, and payment initiation surface.

    Pay now with ACH

    Pay securely from a US bank account through Stripe. Stripe will ask for the payer contact email and securely confirm or connect a bank before payment is initiated. Red Threads never sees or stores your full bank account number.

    Send ACH payment link to Accounts Payable

    Send a secure Red Threads payment link to the person or department that handles payment. Bank details entered by Accounts Payable will be used for this order only and will not be saved to your dashboard.

    Final Order / Invoice

    This is a preview. Once your order is placed and paid for we will email you the final invoice and begin with production.
    Steps to begin production with a Purchase Order:
    1. Email this invoice to your Purchasing Department.
    2. Reopen the project's invoice tab and place the Purchase Order.
    Enter one or more email addresses, separated by commas or new lines.
    Submit Purchase Order
    Upload your company purchase order if available. This upload is optional, but the fields below are required to authorize production.
    No file selected.
    By entering a purchase order number and your name, you confirm this is a legitimate purchase order, you accept the approved credit terms on file, you authorize Red Threads to begin production, and you are responsible for payment under those terms.
    Manual Payment Review
    You are about to officially place this order and submit payment manually. Production will not begin until Red Threads receives your payment.
    The document shown here is the final invoice / order copy. After you place the order, the portal will lock to the invoice and payment instructions will be emailed or remain available in the Summary / Invoice tab.
    If your accounting team decides to switch methods later, the locked invoice will still offer credit card and ACH payment options.
    Purchase Order Submitted
    Your purchase order was submitted successfully.
    ✓
    Order placed successfully
    Your order has been placed, and an invoice sent to the email on file. Production will begin once payment is received.
